name: mhc-c
description: Core capture skills for Claude Code — quick notes, epistemic traces, modification logs, prompt development logs, primary outputs, project onboarding, and light orientation. Filesystem-only, no MCP server, no network. AGPL-3.0.
author: Michele Loi

skills.description: Light orientation — show current session state, SID, goal, recent history; detect drift between adapt.md (canonical) and CLAUDE.md (derived)
Quick capture — save an insight, decision, or reference as a lightweight artifact
Epistemic trace — crystallize insights from exploratory conversation into a referenceable artifact
Modification log — track intellectual decisions during revision of any existing artifact
Prompt development log — document option-weighing decisions about what a prompt should generate
Primary output capture — save a deliverable with structured metadata and upstream artifact references
Project bootstrap — set up a project to use MHC-C, generate config + adapt.md + CLAUDE.md + methodology.md
